description: In Python, validate the argparse parsing, json/pickle decoding, and encoding on file/network IO where external data crosses in.
body: In Python, defects cluster at argparse parsing, json/pickle decoding, and encoding on file/network IO, where assumptions about types, ownership, or encoding stop holding. Use when a change crosses public module API, __all__, type hints, and ABC contracts or consumes data from outside the program. Do not assume the other side honors your contract, and avoid trusting input without checking it. Actions: identify the boundary, test both valid and malformed input, verify the error path, and record the assumptions you are relying on. Validation signals include tests for the failure path, a trace of rejected input, and a documented contract at public module API, __all__, type hints, and ABC contracts. Risk boundary: escalate when the boundary handles untrusted input, crosses a trust/security line, or feeds a system you cannot roll back.
